prose.en: Providers MUST establish and maintain an email address to receive messages from FedRAMP; this inbox is a FedRAMP Security Inbox (FSI).

required-artifacts: Email address to receive messages from FedRAMP

en: Unless otherwise notified, FedRAMP will use the listed Security Email on the Marketplace for these notifications.
If a provider establishes a new inbox in reaction to this guidance that is different from the Security Email then they must follow the AFC-CSO-NOC (Notification of Changes) rules to notify FedRAMP.

danger.en: Be careful using a personal email tied to an individual for this inbox due to the significant risk to future communications after a change in personnel!
